headline: CRISPR Therapeutics AG vs. Vertex Pharmaceuticals: Which Healthcare Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: From gene-editing breakthroughs to blockbuster cystic fibrosis drugs, these two industry leaders present sharply contrasting financials and risk profiles.
